executionArgs.additionalInstruction:
RideOn is a Flutter-based carpooling app using Supabase backend and OpenStreetMap.
Users can:- Signup/Login via OTP- Search rides- Book seats- Cancel bookings- Chat- Trigger SOS alerts
Test Scenarios:
1. Authentication:
Signup, login, logout, wrong OTP
2. Ride Search:
Location search, GPS autofill, date selection
3. Booking:
Open ride, select seats, confirm booking
4. Cancel:
Cancel booking with reason
5. Publish Ride:
Create and publish ride
6. Chat:
Send/receive messages
7. SOS:
Trigger and cancel SOS
Repeat each flow 100–500 times with random inputs.
Stress Testing:- Rapid tap buttons (1000 times)- Multiple users booking same ride- Network ON/OFF switching- Background/foreground switching
Fail Conditions:- App crash- Duplicate booking- API/data mismatch- UI freeze > 3 seconds- SOS failure
Track API response time and log all failed requests.
